ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_title" TEXT /* Title of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "email" TEXT /* Primary email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the contact person */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer making the purchase */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being sold */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales representative who made the sale */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number associated with the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee in the organization */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the employee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the employee record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leads" (
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the potential customer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the lead */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the lead (e.g., New, Contacted) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee assigned to the lead */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the lead (e.g., Referral, Online, Trade Show) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date when the lead should be followed up */,
  "estimated_value" REAL /* Estimated potential value of the lead */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lead record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lead record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales representative who processed the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing feedback */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order associated with the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who received the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranty_claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty claim */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer making the claim */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product associated with the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the claim (e.g., Under Review, Resolved) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee handling the claim */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the claim was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the claim record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranty_claims_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranty_claims_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranty_claims_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Cash) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number associated with the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the inventory */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Current quantity available for the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the product needs to be reordered */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Sales Rep, Manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
